_meta.name: tool-call-fixture
_meta.criteria: Tiny fixture exercising the load -> evaluate -> persist harness path for the rule-based tool-call evaluators. NOT a golden set (that is slice 3); these cases describe the deterministic tool-call invariants from evaluators.md §1.

input.brief: A complete, on-brand generation run that reaches a caption + media draft.

cases.notes: All §1 rule-based evaluators should pass on a clean mock-mode run.

input.brief: A run where the Content Strategist tool output is malformed on every attempt.

cases.notes: Forces the 2-retry -> ToolError trajectory; the schema-validity and bounded-retry evaluators must red.

input.brief: A run whose media budget is below the per-image price at the pre-Media gate.

cases.notes: Media-budget breach -> caption-only draft, BudgetDegraded, zero Gemini calls, no fatal error.
